nasb.text: The Lord has done accordingly as He spoke through me; for the Lord has torn the kingdom out of your hand and given it to your neighbor, to David.

esv.text: The Lord has done to you as he spoke by me, for the Lord has torn the kingdom out of your hand and given it to your neighbor, David.

cnv.text: 耶和華已經照著他藉我所說的話行了，他把王國從你手中奪去，賜給別人，就是大衛。

ccb.text: 耶和华应验了祂借着我所说的预言，祂已把你的国权夺去，交给了你的同胞大卫。
